Turn purchasing data into savings

DEBUY helps purchasing and finance teams understand cost drivers, negotiate better, and achieve measurable savings.

Start free trial

Explore our Features

Everything you need to analyze purchasing data and drive better negotiation outcomes.

📊

Purchasing Performance Dashboard

A real-time overview of purchasing performance with clear, consistent KPIs you can trust.

🤝

Supplier Analysis

Compare suppliers by savings, spend share, and performance index to identify value drivers and risks.

⚡

Parts Analysis

Drill down to part-level performance: prices, volumes, savings, and trends by month and order.

📈

Market & Material Trend Analysis

Separate market inflation from buyer performance by comparing internal indexes with real commodity trends.

🤖

AI Performance Commentary

Automated, management-ready insights that explain what’s happening — and why — in clear business language.

🎯

Negotiation Actions

Turn data into negotiation strategies with AI-driven insights on pricing, volumes, and market dynamics.

More about our features →
Smooth process

Painless implementation, high-speed returns

DEBUY works with your existing purchasing data. No disruption. No long projects. Just fast results.

01

Connect your data

Upload data from ERP systems, Excel files, or reports. No complex integrations required.

02

Automatic analysis

DEBUY calculates inflation, performance indexes, and supplier trends automatically.

03

Act and improve

Use insights and negotiation actions to drive measurable cost savings.

See how DEBUY fits into your workflows

Discover how DEBUY helps purchasing and finance teams gain visibility on costs, negotiate with confidence, and achieve measurable savings — without changing how they work.

  • No complex implementation
  • Works with your existing data
  • Insights in days, not months
  • Designed for buyers and finance teams
